texto: When faith simplifies things that need to remain complex, instead of giving us strength to live with complexity, when it gives us answers where none exist, instead of helping us appreciate the sacredness of living with questions, when it offers certainty when there needs to be doubt, and when it tells us that we have arrived when we should be searching-then there is a problem with that faith.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Brad Hirschfield sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “When faith simplifies things that need to remain complex, instead of giving us strength to live w…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, faith, instead, útil em momentos de reflexao.
